message:
test(render): comprehensive NDJSON output format test coverage

Adds 14 tests covering NDJSON rendering edge cases and wrapper-object
field extraction to prevent regressions in streaming output.

Edge cases:
- ndjson_empty_result_streaming: empty array produces no output
- ndjson_large_payload_items: 500 items with 200-char payloads, all
  lines parse as valid JSON
- ndjson_single_item_array: single-element array
- ndjson_boolean_value / ndjson_string_value: scalar passthrough
- ndjson_mixed_type_array: heterogeneous item types
- ndjson_deeply_nested_objects: multi-level nesting preserved
- ndjson_unicode_content: CJK and emoji characters

Wrapper-object field extraction:
- ndjson_wrapper_issues_field / messages / entries / rows / records:
  verifies that objects with known collection fields (issues, messages,
  entries, rows, records) are unwrapped into per-item NDJSON lines

Nested array preservation:
- ndjson_nested_array_items_preserved: items containing arrays are
  serialized intact on a single line

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
